task.title: Write documentation compiler skill contract
task.summary: Define documentation-mode instructions for converting accepted feedback into KB edits and `documentation_build` evidence.

goal.outcome: Documentation mode compiles accepted feedback into canonical knowledge changes and a validated `documentation_build`.
acceptance: `codewiki-documentation` skill frontmatter triggers on accepted feedback builds, KB/spec updates, and documentation alignment work.
Instructions state exact actions, tools, KB ownership rules, `codewiki_build kind=documentation` point, validation point, and planning handoff output.
Instructions remove stale migration wording and send task shaping to planning mode.
non_goals: Do not write planning task-shaping guidance beyond handoff requirements.
Do not edit feedback, implementation, or validation loop content except route pointers.
verification: Run scoped `codewiki_audit` for skills and alignment.
Inspect against knowledge and compiler specs.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Implemented TASK-094 documentation compiler skill contract with a dedicated codewiki-documentation skill, exact KB/documentation-build/validation/planning handoff guidance, and tests covering the new public skill surface.
checks_run: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck

evidence: Added prompt asset smoke assertions for documentation skill existence, frontmatter, `codewiki_build kind="documentation"`, planning handoff language, and planning-mode task routing.
Updated package smoke to expect `codewiki-documentation` as a public package skill.
Updated TASK-076 restructure test to allow the main CodeWiki skill plus focused feedback and documentation compiler skills.
notes: Targeted asset/package tests were run before the broader smoke, pack, feature, and typecheck suite.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Created focused public documentation compiler skill under `skills/codewiki-documentation/`.
Updated legacy documentation loop asset to define accepted feedback -> KB edits -> documentation build -> validation -> planning handoff flow.
Updated main CodeWiki skill and README to acknowledge the new documentation skill surface.
notes: No TypeScript source behavior changed; edits are skill/documentation/test contract changes.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Added prompt asset smoke assertions for documentation skill existence, frontmatter, `codewiki_build kind="documentation"`, planning handoff language, and planning-mode task routing.
Updated package smoke to expect `codewiki-documentation` as a public package skill.
Updated TASK-076 restructure test to allow the main CodeWiki skill plus focused feedback and documentation compiler skills.
code_change_evidence: Created focused public documentation compiler skill under `skills/codewiki-documentation/`.
Updated legacy documentation loop asset to define accepted feedback -> KB edits -> documentation build -> validation -> planning handoff flow.
Updated main CodeWiki skill and README to acknowledge the new documentation skill surface.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: `codewiki-documentation` skill frontmatter triggers on accepted feedback builds, KB/spec updates, and documentation alignment work.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Created `skills/codewiki-documentation/SKILL.md` with `name: codewiki-documentation` and a description targeting accepted `feedback_build`, product/system KB alignment, documentation changes, `documentation_build`, validation, and planning handoff.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Instructions state exact actions, tools, KB ownership rules, `codewiki_build kind=documentation` point, validation point, and planning handoff output.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `skills/codewiki-documentation/SKILL.md` and `skills/codewiki-documentation/references/tools.md` define `codewiki_state`, direct KB reads/edits, artifact status, `codewiki_build kind="documentation"`, `codewiki_audit`, `codewiki_validation profile="documentation"`, and `codewiki_session_handoff` to planning.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Instructions remove stale migration wording and send task shaping to planning mode.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Rewrote `skills/codewiki/loops/documentation.md` to remove migration-era roadmap-task creation guidance and explicitly state routine roadmap mutation belongs to the planning compiler; documentation skill forbids routine roadmap task creation/refinement.

closure_brief.user_intent: Continue improving CodeWiki skills by creating focused loop skills with precise tool/build/gateway guidance; implement the documentation compiler skill contract next.
implemented_changes: Added dedicated `codewiki-documentation` public skill with exact documentation compiler workflow.
Added documentation tool reference for KB edits, `documentation_build`, validation, and planning handoff.
Updated legacy documentation loop guidance, main skill routing, README, and tests for the new skill surface.
acceptance_evidence: Documentation skill frontmatter and workflow exist.
Documentation skill requires KB edits before `codewiki_build kind="documentation"` and routes executable work to planning.
Tests and package smoke pass with the new public documentation skill.
checks: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck
non_goals_preserved: Did not implement planning/implementation/validation loop skills.
Did not create or refine roadmap tasks from documentation mode guidance.
Did not change runtime compiler/source semantics.
remaining_risks: Generated CodeWiki graph/task view files changed because roadmap/build state was updated.
Implementation build lacks source_planning_build due accepted feedback-to-task shortcut used before the new planning skill exists.

risks: Implementation build does not cite a planning_build because TASK-094 was created directly from accepted feedback during this planning refactor; future loop tasks should restore normal documentation/planning build traceability.
TASK-093 remains pending fresh-context validation from a staged handoff.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-094 Write documentation compiler skill contract implementation evidence
commit.body:
Implemented TASK-094 documentation compiler skill contract with a dedicated codewiki-documentation skill, exact KB/documentation-build/validation/planning handoff guidance, and tests covering the new public skill surface.

Checks: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs, npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck, skill markdown link check script, codewiki_audit profiles alignment,task,generated-parity for TASK-094
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
